response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive full-stack experience and familiarity with distributed systems, but her resume lacks direct evidence of experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or AI-driven growth systems. While she demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and leadership, her background skews toward general software development and geospatial tools rather than growth/experimentation systems at scale.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems and low-latency applications, as shown at Dunnhumby and re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and technical leadership
Proven ability to architect and maintain scalable platforms (e.g., GISCollective, MCP infrastructure)
concerns: No explicit mention of experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
Limited experience with AI tools in the context of growth/experimentation systems
Resume focuses heavily on web/mobile development rather than enterprise-scale experimentation infrastructure
